title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 -  23 -  2017: Google Earthing Swimmers in Boulder Reservoir

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder Reservoir, where he discovered an open water swimming course and is researching it for his triathlon-related website. He shares his multi-year plan to polish his website before starting to exercise around 2020, describes his current progress adding swimmers to a course visualization, and closes with a historical aside about a 1928 dam collapse near Los Angeles that killed 600 people.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: 2019 is the polishing year; he won't finish this year and won't start exercising until 2020
finds the course impressive and wants to start doing it around 2020
feels genuine joy watching it come together, though he's only had glimpses of that feeling so far
finishing swimming section first, then running, then back to the Race Across America listing
